query:
SELECT p.id AS product_id, p.po_number, p.batch_no, p.serial_number, p.imei, p.current_station_code, p.current_status, p.sheet_row_number, p.last_sheet_synced_at, p.archived_at
FROM products p
WHERE p.batch_no IN ('500025007','500025004','500024968','500025035','500025029')
ORDER BY p.batch_no;

SELECT se.id AS station_event_id, se.product_id, p.batch_no, se.station_code, se.operator_user_id, u.name AS operator_name, se.event_type, se.count_for_productivity, se.business_date, se.created_at
FROM station_events se
JOIN products p ON p.id = se.product_id
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = se.operator_user_id
WHERE p.batch_no IN ('500025007','500025004','500024968','500025035','500025029')
  AND se.event_type = 'complete'
ORDER BY p.batch_no, se.station_code, se.id;

SELECT psd.id AS detail_id, psd.station_event_id, psd.product_id, p.batch_no, psd.station_code, psd.user_id, u.name AS user_name, psd.earned_points, psd.business_date
FROM productivity_score_details psd
JOIN products p ON p.id = psd.product_id
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = psd.user_id
WHERE p.batch_no IN ('500025007','500025004','500024968','500025035','500025029')
ORDER BY p.batch_no, psd.station_code, psd.id;

SELECT batch_no, COUNT(*) AS active_count
FROM products
WHERE archived_at IS NULL AND batch_no IS NOT NULL AND batch_no <> ''
GROUP BY batch_no
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY active_count DESC, batch_no
LIMIT 20;

SELECT psd.id AS detail_id, psd.station_event_id, psd.product_id, p.batch_no, psd.station_code, psd.user_id, u.name AS user_name, psd.earned_points, psd.business_date
FROM productivity_score_details psd

WHERE p.batch_no IN ('500025007','500025004','500024968','500025035','500025029')
ORDER BY p.batch_no, psd.station_code, psd.id;

SELECT batch_no, COUNT(*) AS active_count
FROM products
WHERE archived_at IS NULL AND batch_no IS NOT NULL AND batch_no <> ''

HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY active_count DESC, batch_no
